summary: REQ-9 is largely implemented via a guest-mode CTA that opens ProfileSetupModal (isGuestUpgrade=true) from the Dashboard without navigation. REQ-8 is only partially implemented: a GuestModeChecklist exists and uses a responsive grid, but it does not use the exact required checklist labels (it splits labels/status into separate UI elements and changes section headings). REQ-10 is partially implemented: Jobs and DataLogging add/export are blocked with a consistent toast message, but Community posting/saving locks and Study Progress persistence safeguards are not evidenced; Diagnostics save/export blocking is only partially evidenced (export messaging mentioned, but persistence/export coverage is unclear from the truncated diff).

missing_requirements.requirement: Use the exact guest-mode checklist labels as specified (e.g., “Study (Read-only)”, “Jobs (Sign in to unlock)”, etc.) with no missing/renamed/paraphrased text.
missing_requirements.reason: GuestModeChecklist renders feature name and status separately (e.g., label 'Study' with badge 'Read-only', and locked items show label 'Jobs' with badge 'Sign in to unlock') rather than the exact combined strings required. Section headings also differ from the requested phrasing ('Visible to guests (Read-only/Limited)' and 'Locked for guests (Sign in to unlock)').

missing_requirements.requirement: Community posting: block any posting/saving actions if present, or clearly indicate it is locked when isGuest=true.
missing_requirements.reason: CommunityTab only adds an optional isGuest prop and shows no gating/blocked-action messaging for posting/saving actions in the provided diff excerpt.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (CommunityTab summary mentions 'future guest restriction implementation')

missing_requirements.requirement: Study progress tracking: ensure no guest progress persistence calls are made (if any exist).
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff summary shows removal/gating of any Study progress persistence calls for guests; StudyTab changes are mentioned but not tied to guest progress persistence prevention.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/tabs/StudyTab.tsx (mentioned in summaries; diff content not shown)

missing_requirements.requirement: Full Diagnostics: block saving diagnostic sessions / exporting diagnostic reports when isGuest=true and inform the user it requires a full account.
missing_requirements.reason: TroubleshooterTab references guest restrictions on report export and removal of non-existent backend save functionality, but the diff excerpt does not clearly evidence that all diagnostic session persistence and export paths are gated when isGuest=true.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/modified Study modules and Study content (e.g., 'UEi DL589 Multimeter Guide' and 'Multimeter Training'), despite the BuildRequest non-goal explicitly stating not to add new Study modules or modify educational content for this change.
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff summary explicitly describes new Study modules and content changes unrelated to guest-mode labeling/restrictions.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (StudyTab summary mentions new UEi DL589 multimeter guide)
project_state.json (summary and existing_features list includes new study modules reqIds REQ-1..REQ-5, etc.)

hallucinated_features.description: Enhanced Parts & Specs with a comprehensive refrigerant specification database and related UI (searchable table, dialogs, safety/environmental data), which is outside the guest-mode checklist/CTA/restrictions scope.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by REQ-8/REQ-9/REQ-10 and contradicts the request focus to avoid broader redesign/features.

hallucinated_features.description: Large global style overhaul (OKLCH color system, performance optimizations, touch targets) unrelated to guest-mode checklist and restrictions.
